heading: Omitted
label: 677j Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which set out permitted uses of tribal funds and imposed restrictions on the use of tribal funds by the mixed-blood group until its adoption of a plan for termination of Federal supervision of the group, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 1168 Stat. 873
